title: Transit Drain Market
notes: Connects C4 Transit Vendor Square, B5 Black Road Drains, D5 Pressure Service Route, and future C6 Lower Drain Line.
Flooded transit drain market with raised market platforms, Sable water cache, Black Road crawl marks, drain-market stalls, and pressure-valve clutter.
Flooded center is mostly blocked; raised platforms and outer service lanes remain walkable/driveable.
Ground items render below Donny/NPC bodies.
